author: wdblink
description: Use Codex from a sidebar in your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: echooo
manifest.description: Use Codex from a sidebar in your vault.
manifest.name: Codeian

name: Codeian

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Keep Codeian session tabs in their stored order when switching, saving, or completing background runs.
- Preserve the active session when trimming retained sessions to the five-session cap.
- Prevent missing background session updates from being written into the active session.
- Includes the generated main.js bundle for this fix.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fix in-app updates in networks where release asset redirects return HTTP 403.
- Prefer raw GitHub file downloads to avoid release asset redirect 403s and API rate-limit pressure.
- Fall back to GitHub Contents API and release assets when raw files are unavailable.
- Add CI coverage so the committed bundle stays aligned with the source build.
- Preserve compact Codex activity history in sidebar assistant messages.
- Include persisted Codex activity history when continuing a Codeian sidebar session.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fix in-app updates in networks where release asset redirects return HTTP 403.
- Make `main.js` available through GitHub Contents API by release tag.
- Add CI coverage so the committed bundle stays aligned with the source build.
- Preserve compact Codex activity history in sidebar assistant messages.
- Include persisted Codex activity history when continuing a Codeian sidebar session.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fix in-app updates in networks where release asset redirects return HTTP 403.
- Download release files through GitHub Contents API by release tag before falling back to release assets.
- Preserve compact Codex activity history in sidebar assistant messages.
- Include persisted Codex activity history when continuing a Codeian sidebar session.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fix in-app updates in networks where `github.com/releases/download` times out but GitHub's API remains reachable.
- Download release files through the GitHub release asset API before falling back to browser download URLs.
- Preserve compact Codex activity history in sidebar assistant messages.
- Include persisted Codex activity history when continuing a Codeian sidebar session.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Preserve compact Codex activity history in sidebar assistant messages.
- Show terminal-like run context for tool calls, status updates, file changes, and reasoning summaries.
- Include persisted Codex activity history when continuing a Codeian sidebar session.
- Backfill visible transcript history from older saved session prompt/output fields.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Reduce Obsidian Community Scorecard review risks.
- Preserve right-sidebar activation without requiring the newer `Workspace.revealLeaf` API.
- Improve popout-window compatibility and child-process environment handling.
- Add project contribution guidance.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.
releases.name: v0.2.12

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description:
- Allow a running session to continue while opening or switching to another chat.
- Track Codex runner state per session, with active-session cancel controls and running badges in the session list.
- Notify when a background session finishes, with a Codeian-styled notification and an Open action.
- Add regression coverage for updating inactive sessions without stealing active context.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.11

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description: - Fix assistant-rendered vault links whose href is emitted as app://obsidian.md/<absolute-vault-path>.\n- Decode app links, strip the current vault path, and ignore copied line suffixes such as .md:29 during file resolution.\n- Add regression coverage for the reported 上下文工程.md link shape.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.10

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description: - Fix @ vault mention indexing so large vaults do not drop files before search.\n- Prefer Obsidian vault.getFiles() for file suggestions while keeping folder suggestions separate, following the Claudian reference pattern.\n- Add regression coverage for Chinese paths with spaces and files sorted beyond the old 500-item cap.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.9

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description:
- Fix @ references for vault paths that contain spaces, Chinese punctuation, and parentheses.
- Add regression coverage for LLM-Wiki/raw/notes/手工川线下分享会 and 和 GPT 关于向量世界（AI 世界）什么最重要的讨论.
- Improve assistant-output vault link opening with exact-first and loose fallback resolution for AI-generated links that omit spaces or parenthetical qualifiers.
- Keep external links outside Codeian vault routing.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.8

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description:
- Open assistant output links that resolve to vault notes or files directly in Obsidian.
- Preserve external link behavior while showing a Notice for missing vault targets.
- Improve @ file suggestions so paths without .md and absolute vault paths can match existing files.
- Include all vault files in @ suggestions, not only Markdown files.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.7

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description:
- Add vault folder candidates to @ prompt suggestions.
- Match nested folders by basename or path fragment.
- Insert folder references with a trailing slash and label them as folders.
- Keep hidden, Obsidian config, git, and dependency folders out of suggestions.
- Preserve existing markdown file mention behavior.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.6

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description:
- Isolate Codex sidebar context per Codeian session.
- Include only the active session transcript when continuing prompts such as '继续'.
- Preserve cancelled run prompts for follow-up continuity while keeping unsent drafts out of Codex history.
- Keep note-context prompts out of persisted transcript history.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.5

releases.author: WdBlink
releases.description: - Add a settings-page update button that installs the latest GitHub release assets into the current vault plugin folder.\n- Validate downloaded release assets before overwriting plugin files.\n- Bump plugin metadata to 0.2.4.
releases.name: Codeian v0.2.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Add `@` vault Markdown file suggestions in the Codeian prompt.
- Filter candidates by typed text and insert the selected vault-relative path.
- Refresh file suggestions when vault Markdown files are created, deleted, or renamed.
- Address Obsidian community plugin review lint requirements.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then copy them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/codeian/` folder.
releases.name: v0.2.3

releases.description: First demo build. Adds an Obsidian desktop sidebar that runs the local Codex CLI in read-only sandbox mode and streams output back into the view.
releases.name: Codeian v0.1.0
